nuclear_winter_babylon.note: Complete Nuclear Winter mode removed Sept 2021. All assets still ship. NW.esm (28MB) also still included.

orphaned_voices.note: 24% of all voice files have no matching INFO record in the ESM. Audio exists, can never play in-game.

fo4_legacy.note: FO4 child NPC voice recordings carried over from engine fork. Diamond City, Commonwealth, vault references.

cornbot_cobby.note: Burning Springs corn-themed robot mascot with full texture set

lesser_devil.note: Jersey Devil variant with 3 horn styles — smaller cousin?

vulture.note: Flying scavenger bird with posed corpse variant and DNA sample prop

babylon_pa_tiers.note: T-45 PA in 4 NW-exclusive visual tiers with level-gated skins

babylon_hud.note: babylonhudmenu.swf and babylonspectatorhud.swf — complete Flash UI for NW mode
